consistent_residual_jacobian_newton.claim_boundary: Residual/Jacobian receipts are diagnostic evidence until they prove a production ROCm/HIP, non-component-only Newton path with residual gate closure, a present restart checkpoint, and no closure-disclaiming claim boundary.

receipts.claim_boundary: Production ROCm/HIP residual-Jacobian consistency was requested and routed to the HIP-required direct residual Newton proof path. The probe does not use this module's CPU diagnostic assembler. This receipt closes neither full G1 nor release readiness unless the child HIP residual engine contract and consistent residual/Jacobian Newton gate both pass without blockers.

duplicate_alias_receipts.non_count_reason: duplicate alias of canonical non-promoting receipt; retained for traceability only
duplicate_alias_receipts.top_level_residual_boundary: top_level_controller_residual_differs_from_child_frontier; status uses child receipt residual for non-promoting boundary evidence

hip_residual_row_backend.claim_boundary: HIP row backend receipts are live descent/saturation evidence only; they do not close G1 unless residual gates and production in-process ROCm/HIP residency are both proven.

receipts.assessment: Followup67 wires the followup66 native HIP full residual batch backend into the direct residual Newton row-correction FD/alpha replay boundary. This proves the backend can serve an actual correction driver path, not only an isolated replay probe. The small largest-row smoke accepted a 3.62e-7 N residual improvement, but the physical residual gate remains open at 0.0336381164 N.
receipts.claim_boundary: Integration evidence only. This does not claim full 3D nonlinear equilibrium closure, residual gate pass, or production in-process ROCm/HIP residency.
receipts.next_solver_step: Use the connected backend for broader adaptive coupled shell membrane/bending/frame material-globalization searches instead of repeating the tiny largest-row smoke shape.

receipts.assessment: The connected HIP full-residual row backend is now useful for live descent, not only replay validation. Followup68 shows the broad residual_shell_geometry_normal_bending_rows shape remains saturated/no-descent at the post-shell frontier despite GPU-backed FD/alpha replay. Followup69 switches to HIP-backed largest-row finite-difference row correction and accepts two promotions, reducing the direct residual from 0.0336384785 N to 0.0336175176 N. The physical residual gate remains open by 0.0326175176 N.
receipts.claim_boundary: Residual descent evidence only. This does not claim final residual gate closure, full-load path closure, or production in-process ROCm/HIP residency.
receipts.next_solver_step: Resume from the followup69 checkpoint and use the HIP-backed largest-row lane with adaptive retargeting/support refresh, then test whether the hotspot returns to shell membrane/bending or shifts to a different coupled block.

receipts.assessment: Followup70-72 prove that refreshed HIP-backed largest-row finite-difference correction remains a live G1 descent lane after followup69. Three chained probes accepted 18 promotions and reduced the attached-policy direct residual from 0.0336175176 N to 0.0334674359 N, a 1.50e-4 N improvement. The latest frontier remains a coupled shell_membrane/shell_bending_drilling/frame cancellation pattern, so repetition alone is still too slow for gate closure without an adaptive controller and a lower-overhead persistent Rust/HIP residual/JVP worker.
receipts.claim_boundary: Residual descent evidence only. This does not claim final residual gate closure, full-load path closure, or production in-process ROCm/HIP residency.
receipts.next_solver_step: Resume from the followup72 checkpoint. Continue narrowed largest_rows refresh while the last accepted improvement stays above numerical noise, then switch to a coupled node/shell/frame controller when the largest-row alpha collapses.

receipts.assessment: Followup73 squeezes only 1.90e-6 N from the narrowed support=1 largest_rows tail and then stops with no_residual_descent. Followup74 tests wider support 4/8 from that state and no-descends immediately, with the best candidate worsening the residual to 0.034802 N. The latest frontier is still a flat mixed frame/shell_membrane/shell_bending_drilling plateau around 0.0334655 N, so plain largest_rows row correction is saturated.
receipts.claim_boundary: Residual descent and saturation evidence only. This does not claim final residual gate closure, full-load path closure, or production in-process ROCm/HIP residency.
receipts.next_solver_step: Switch from scalar largest_rows repetition to a coupled node/shell/frame controller seeded by nodes 2221, 2846, 2220, 2380, and 2202, or implement the persistent Rust/HIP residual/JVP worker before another broad adaptive search.

largest_rows_operator_strategy_exhaustio.claim_boundary: This exhausts only the configured largest-rows target128/support8 support-selection/Jacobian strategy matrix at the latest checkpoint. It does not close G1 and does not rule out a different consistent residual/Jacobian Newton operator or production ROCm/HIP path.

next_actions: all configured largest-rows target128/support8 support/Jacobian strategies are exhausted at the latest checkpoint; do not spend another slice on largest-rows support/Jacobian retuning. port residual-row batch replay with state-dependent shell material tangent to the production ROCm/HIP lane
